configurationDescription: Choose ASCII85 or Z85 before encoding text or file bytes.
plainTextDescription: Paste or type any UTF-8 text, including emoji and non-Latin characters.
encodedOutputDescription: Encoded result for the current text or file input.
emptyStateDescription: Enter text or import a file to generate Base85 output.
invalidLengthTitle: Z85 requires input lengths that are a multiple of 4 bytes.
